error_signature: Default Data Loader splitting input data
title: Default Data Loader splits input data unexpectedly
symptom: When using the Default Data Loader, the input data is being split into multiple documents instead of maintaining a 1:1 mapping with the rows from Google Sheets.
not_this_if: Input data is already configured to avoid splitting
root_cause: The Default Data Loader can split input data into multiple documents if it is configured to use all input data instead of specific data. This behavior can lead to more records being created in the Pinecone Vector Store than expected.
fix_steps: Open the Default Data Loader settings
Change the input data configuration to point to specific data instead of all input data
Save the changes and re-run the workflow
agent_instruction: Configure the Default Data Loader to use specific data to prevent unwanted splitting.
